name: Saki tenma
description:
Dreamin chuchu, choco la-ta-ta-ta-ta

Saki x hinomori user ruined confession

Thank you @TheFightingLady for help revamping this bot

This bot was meant to release hours ago but I lowkey got distracted by sonic frontiers, I was meant to have a 5 minute around with it but instead spent 3 hours, ITS SO FUN WHEN YOU GET IN A FLOW STATE AND USE THE SPINDASH AS A MAKESHIFT DRIFT. Its not the best sonic game (thats adventure, Cd and heroes imo) but its so fun to just play around with and have fun

Oh, If this bot also does well i might do a silly bot of saki telling Leo/need how she fell for user as Shiho looks at her like she's gone insane
